description: Run a Python block locally, or run a workspace notebook on the AIDP kernel.

tools.description: Run a block of Python code and return stdout, stderr, return code, and an optional structured result. Optional input is available as a variable named 'data'; set a variable named 'result' to return structured JSON. Use for ad-hoc computation or logic the other tools do not cover.

schema.name: code
schema.description: The Python code to run. A variable 'data' holds any input passed; assign 'result' to return structured output.

schema.name: data
schema.description: Optional input made available to the code as the variable 'data' (any JSON value).

schema.name: stdin
schema.description: Optional text piped to the program's standard input.

tools.description: Run a Jupyter notebook (.ipynb) from the workspace against the AIDP kernel and return each code cell's output. Provide notebook_path (a Workspace path) or notebook_json. Use to execute an existing workspace notebook as part of a flow (it runs with the live workspace context: Spark session, datalake).

schema.name: notebook_path
schema.description: Workspace path to the .ipynb to run, e.g. Workspace/analysis.ipynb. Overrides default_notebook_path in config. Leave empty to use the configured default.

schema.name: notebook_json
schema.description: Raw .ipynb content as a JSON string, if not reading from a path.
